status: updated after EVAL-FIX-001, CX-ROUTE-EVIDENCE-001, AGM-EVAL-001, SYS-EVAL-001, and SYS-OBS-EVAL-001
purpose: Current-state package for moving from the completed eval-basing/system-smoke sequence into durable eval persistence, CI regression gates, quality scoring, dataset management, frontend dashboards, polish/alignment, and first full sanity test.
hardBoundaries: No raw prompts, completions, secrets, marker payloads, or provider headers in eval artifacts or UI
Fixtures must remain visibly distinct from live evidence
Manual eval POST remains gated and non-production only
Ontogony.Platform remains neutral; product semantics stay in Allagma/Conexus/Kanon/frontend
Do not add new topology modes before durable persistence and CI gates
